title: Set up Lemon Squeezy for payments and subscriptions
summary: Complete Lemon Squeezy integration — SDK setup, dynamic checkout, webhooks with signature verification, subscription portal, and license keys in Next.js.
declaration: I will integrate Lemon Squeezy into this project: configure the JS SDK, create a checkout flow, handle subscription webhooks, and set up the customer billing portal. If you prefer Stripe or Paddle, say so before I begin.
